Join Monday Night Call

What Sree Space offers

What are you asking of yourself right now?

Each offering starts where you are — not where a program says you should be.

Yoga

Movement that meets you where you are. 1:1, group, therapy, kundalini.

Learn more

Hands-on Therapy

Access Bars, Body Process, Energetic Face Lift. Quiet release.

Learn more

Talk Energy Clearance

Conversation as energy work for life's knots.

Learn more

Consultation

Tailor-made plans drawing on yoga, mudra, kriya, and energy work.

Learn more

Free · Every Monday

Free Monday Night Catch-Up

A weekly ritual that gently guides you back to awareness. Free, by design — you 'pay' by becoming a more present human.

Save your seat

Yoga, hands-on energy work, and consciousness practices — guided by Likhitha Sree.

True empowerment as key
